# Bioinformatics Dashboard Documentation {.unnumbered}

Welcome to the technical documentation of the SPARMVET_VIZ walking skeleton.

This book provides:

- Architectural principles and design decisions
- Module-level responsibilities and contracts
- Development guidelines and implementation notes
- Appendix notes and development process context

Use the sidebar to navigate by section.

---

## Quick Start {.unnumbered}

- Read the preface for project scope and vision
- Review architecture and code structure chapters first
- Use module reference chapters as implementation requirements
